textByHash.02b318c6bc7d65e71a65b0bc1b7c7fe6a34fa717: In the meantime, can I interest you in something?
textByHash.0758003ad4ebd1467809a953d8a7eb625457f062: Then move along, you filthy ragamuffin, I have customers to serve!
textByHash.0cad38a1e5062081008cc11bc8b37e5b0d7e0ca3: The very idea! My wines are the finest in the district!
textByHash.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHash.1ce6c071181c39b29841b4c1997034a9fc57889d: Well, I'll put something special to one side for you.
textByHash.745dee30b8f9121e68b4073a9b1549f873716a5a: You're the thief who stole from me!
textByHash.86d805ffa5df539b3b89ad729d0e5ec79b0ac1a6: Aaaah...say no more sir, I have some in specially.
textByHash.907bee10a5750e11159102773c5c00db4680a9ff: Can I help you at all?
textByHash.a14cf2b65bc74c590f244c380ac1c3613110563d: I will have some in soon, if he needs it.
textByHash.a7abbe984d08c07fd88e4985e1415ca90cff1ce4: Please...I havent got any more vinegar. Give me some time I beg you.
textByHash.ab9a5e1b99def31ab9c6f42a418aa6832e0cd63c: Well, just remember I have some in stock for you when you want it.
textByHash.b53263210bab955daeef9f81fdf9a81a99d7aacb: Ah! Good afternoon your lordship. I take it you have come for a refill?
